name: Jello Pops
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the Jello in hot water.
2. Mix in cold water, sugar, and Koolaide package.
3. Pour mixture into dixie cups with sticks.
4. Freeze completely.
5. Peel off the dixie cup to reveal your popcycle.
The best results were achieved with wild strawberry jello and cherry Koolaide, but any flavor combination can be used.
